code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./Products.css";import AddToCartButton from"./AddToCartButton";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Products(){const[products,setProducts]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetch("/api/products").then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>setProducts(data)).catch(err=>console.error("Error fetching products:",err));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"products-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"\uD83D\uDECD Available Products"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"product-grid",children:products.map(p=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"product-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:p.image||"https://via.placeholder.com/200",alt:p.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:p.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\u20B9",p.price]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AddToCartButton,{productId:p.id})]},p.id))})]});}export default Products;
